title: glyceria elata
intro: Glyceria elata, also known as tall mannagrass, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe various health issues. The medicinal properties of Glyceria elata are believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Glyceria elata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
